title: 'She'll See Lotus Bloom On May 4': BJP Chief Nitin Nabin Targets Mamata Banerjee, Accuses TMC Of Fostering 'Hooliganism'
description: Earlier, BJP MP and party's star campaigner Manoj Tiwari also launched an attack on the ruling Trinamool Congress (TMC), claiming that the tenure of Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee was nearing its end.
